title: M5: only able to login once
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY, username VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL, password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, last_login TIMESTAMP NULL);
INSERT INTO users (id, username, password, last_login) VALUES (1, 'user1', 'password1', NULL);
UPDATE users SET last_login = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE username = 'user1';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE last_login IS NOT NULL;
